Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
31 
DRUG_BENEFIT_TYPE 
LABEL: 
Part D Drug Benefit Type 
DESCRIPTION: Indicates the type of Part D benefit structure used by the plan benefit package (Defined Standard, 
Actuarially Equivalent, Basic Alternative, or Enhanced Alternative). 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: DRUG_BENEFIT_TYPE 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
0 = No Benefit Plan Information 
1 =
